name: YT Music — WMP / Winamp Visualizer
description: Overlays MilkDrop (Butterchurn) visualizations on YouTube Music, with a WMP-favorites preset menu (Battery / Ambience / Alchemy vibes).

content_security_policy.sandbox: sandbox allow-scripts allow-popups allow-modals allow-forms; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; child-src 'self'; object-src 'self';
